title: sphaeropteris excelsa
intro: Sphaeropteris excelsa, also known as the tree fern, is a species of plant in the genus Sphaeropteris, characterized by its tall, erect stem and large fronds. The medicinal properties of Sphaeropteris excelsa include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. Sphaeropteris excelsa can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as a tea or added to medicinal concoctions.
